text: The 45 millimeter cartridge side of the linear stapler is inserted into the hole on the proximal stomach.
The suture is kept pulling to prevent slippage.
Then, the stapler with the stomach is pulled towards the duodenal stump.
The anvil side of the linear stapler is inserted to the hole on the duodenal stump.
The proximal stomach and the duodenal stump are everted so that the posterior surface of both sides meet together.
A tagging suture is made on the superior anastomosis line.
